title: Junior Investment Banker at Cholamandalam Finance Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at Cholamandalam Finance Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Cholamandalam Finance Ventures Solutions in Ludhiana is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Cholamandalam Finance Ventures Solutions:
Cholamandalam Finance Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cholamandalam Finance Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
